title: calophyllum heterophyllum
intro: Calophyllum heterophyllum, also known as the Burmese copal tree or the varnish tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Calophyllum heterophyllum include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels and blood pressure. Calophyllum heterophyllum is often used in herbal preparations, including oils, extracts, and capsules, and is also used to make a variety of traditional remedies, including varnishes and paints.
